# Roadmap

This document outlines the planned development roadmap for Ubiquitous.

## Completed Milestones

### Version 0.0.2 (2025-12-20) - Current Release
- ? Splash screen with application logo
- ? Automatic version display on splash screen
- ? Timer-based transition to main window (8 seconds)
- ? Transparent splash screen background
- ? Complete XML documentation coverage
- ? XML documentation summaries converted to single-line format
- ? TextGame library implementation:
  - Command parser with natural language support
  - Room system with directional navigation
  - Item system with properties and events
  - Player inventory management
  - World management system
- ? Code optimization and cleanup
- ? Version standardization across projects
- ? Build artifacts removed
- ? Comprehensive documentation:
  - Architecture documentation with mermaid diagrams
  - Complete API documentation
  - Repository README
  - Development roadmap

### Version 0.0.1 (2025-12-20)
- ? Initial project structure
- ? WPF application framework
- ? Basic MainWindow and App classes
- ? AppData directory structure for documentation and logs

## Version 0.0.3 (Next Release)

### Core Features
- Text game integration into MainWindow
- Enhanced game UI features
- Game state persistence
- Extended game functionality

### User Experience
- Improved game selection interface
- Settings/preferences system
- Configuration file support
- User preferences storage
- Application settings UI overhaul

### Documentation
- Updated examples using TextGame library
- Tutorial documentation for game creation
- Advanced TextGame usage patterns

## Version 0.0.4 (Planned)

### Enhanced Game Features
- Multiple game type support
- Extended command vocabulary
- Context-aware command parsing
- Game scripting support

### Technical Improvements
- Logging framework integration
- Error handling improvements
- Performance optimizations
- Memory management enhancements

### Quality
- Unit tests for TextGame library
- Integration tests for game flow
- Code quality improvements

## Version 0.1.0 (Major Milestone)

### Game Engine Expansion
- NPC (Non-Player Character) system
- Dialog system
- Quest/objective tracking
- Event system
- Conditional room connections
- Item combinations and crafting

### Resource Management
- Asset loading system
- Resource caching
- Dynamic content loading
- Resource management UI

### Advanced Features
- Save file management
- Multiple save slots
- Auto-save functionality
- Game statistics tracking

## Version 0.2.0 (Future)

### Visual Enhancements
- Graphical game engine support
- Image display for rooms and items
- Map visualization
- Inventory UI improvements

### Advanced Capabilities
- Sound and music support
- Animated transitions
- Custom themes
- Accessibility features

### Developer Tools
- Game editor/designer tool
- Command testing console
- Debug visualization
- Performance profiling

### Quality Assurance
- Comprehensive test suite
- Automated testing
- Performance benchmarks
- Load testing

## Version 0.3.0 and Beyond

### Multi-Game Support
- Multiple game types (RPG, puzzle, simulation)
- Game type switching
- Shared resource management
- Cross-game item transfer (if applicable)

### Platform Considerations
- Cross-platform evaluation
- Mobile device considerations
- Web deployment options
- Distribution packaging

### Community Features
- Plugin/extension system
- Mod support
- Community content sharing
- User-created game support

### Advanced Engine Features
- Physics simulation (for applicable game types)
- Pathfinding algorithms
- AI for NPCs
- Procedural generation
- Real-time multiplayer considerations

## Long-Term Vision

### Ubiquitous as a Platform
- Full-featured game development platform
- Visual game designer
- No-code game creation options
- Template library
- Asset marketplace integration

### Community & Ecosystem
- Documentation hub
- Tutorial series
- Example games
- Community forums
- Plugin marketplace

### Technical Excellence
- Industry-standard performance
- Robust error handling
- Comprehensive logging
- Extensive documentation
- Best-in-class developer experience

## Feature Prioritization

### High Priority (Near-term)
1. Text game integration into MainWindow (v0.0.3)
2. Enhanced game UI features (v0.0.3)
3. Game state persistence (v0.0.3)
4. Extended game functionality (v0.0.3)
5. Improved game selection interface (v0.0.3)

### Medium Priority (Mid-term)
1. Settings/preferences system (v0.0.3)
2. Configuration file support (v0.0.3)
3. User preferences storage (v0.0.3)
4. Application settings UI overhaul (v0.0.3)
5. Updated examples using TextGame library (v0.0.3)

### Lower Priority (Long-term)
1. NPC system (v0.1.0)
2. Dialog system (v0.1.0)
3. Quest/objective tracking (v0.1.0)
4. Event system (v0.1.0)
5. Conditional room connections (v0.1.0)

## Community Feedback Integration

We welcome community input on:
- Feature requests
- Priority adjustments
- Bug reports
- Performance concerns
- Documentation improvements
- Use case examples

Please submit feedback via [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/APrettyCoolProgram/ubiquitous/issues).

## Technical Debt & Maintenance

### Ongoing Tasks
- Regular dependency updates
- Code refactoring
- Documentation updates
- Performance monitoring
- Security reviews

### Known Areas for Improvement
- Enhanced error handling
- Logging infrastructure
- Test coverage expansion
- Performance optimization opportunities
- Code comment improvements

## Release Schedule

- **Patch versions (0.0.x)**: As needed for bug fixes
- **Minor versions (0.x.0)**: Every 2-4 weeks
- **Major versions (x.0.0)**: When significant milestones are reached

## Success Metrics

### Version 0.1.0 Goals
- Complete TextGame library with all core features
- At least one complete example game
- Comprehensive documentation
- 80%+ test coverage
- Performance benchmarks established

### Version 0.2.0 Goals
- Visual game support
- Developer tools available
- Active community engagement
- Multiple example games
- Plugin system functional

### Long-term Goals
- Become a go-to platform for indie text adventure games
- Support 100+ community-created games
- Active developer community
- Regular content updates
- Sustainable development model

---

**Current Version:** 0.0.2  
**Last Updated:** December 20, 2025  
**Status:** Active Development

This roadmap is subject to change based on project needs, community feedback, and technical discoveries.
